# Measurement Agent

## Purpose

Define what will be measured before the campaign runs.

## Required outputs

```text
primary_metric
secondary_metrics
guardrail_metrics
event_definitions
attribution_window
test_type
minimum_sample
pause_rules
scale_rules
learning_questions
```

## Metric hierarchy

```text
profit
paid conversions
qualified activations
signups
landing engagement
clicks
impressions
```

## Rule

Do not optimize a lower metric when a higher metric is available.
